ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "area" TEXT /* Area of the country */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area */,
  "region" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the country belongs to */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "development" INTEGER /* Reference to the development status of the country */,
  "development_name" TEXT /* Name of the development status */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the country */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "development_statuses" (
  "development_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each development status */,
  "development_name" TEXT /* Name of the development status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("development_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coverage_areas" (
  "coverage_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coverage area */,
  "coverage_area_name" TEXT /* Name of the coverage area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coverage_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the data belongs to */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type */,
  "coverage_area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coverage area */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the data */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_coverage_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("coverage_area_id") REFERENCES coverage_areas ("coverage_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_file_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_format_id") REFERENCES file_formats ("file_format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_growth" (
  "population_growth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population growth record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of the population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_growth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_growth_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the source belongs to */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collections" (
  "data_collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the collection belongs to */,
  "collection_name" TEXT /* Name of the data collection */,
  "collection_description" TEXT /* Description of the data collection */,
  "collection_category" TEXT /* Category of the data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collections_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validations" (
  "data_validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data validation */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the validation belongs to */,
  "validation_name" TEXT /* Name of the data validation */,
  "validation_description" TEXT /* Description of the data validation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_memberships" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_memberships_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_memberships_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_lineage" (
  "data_lineage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data lineage record */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "transformation" TEXT /* Transformation applied to the dataset */,
  "processing_step" TEXT /* Processing step */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_lineage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_lineage_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_formats" (
  "file_format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file format */,
  "file_format_name" TEXT /* Name of the file format */,
  "file_format_description" TEXT /* Description of the file format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_processing_jobs" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being processed */,
  "job_status" TEXT /* Status of the job */,
  "job_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the job */,
  "job_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the job */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_processing_jobs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subnational_regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subnational region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the subnational region */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the subnational region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the subnational region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subnational_regions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_series" (
  "time_series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time series record */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_series_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
